requirement_topic.en: APUA Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Service and Site Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: APUA并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz供电及站点验收
requirement_topic.zht: APUA併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz供電及站點驗收

summary.en: Antigua and Barbuda's public electricity supply is provided by Antigua Public Utilities Authority (APUA). The market follows a UK/IEC legacy grid environment with nominal 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz service. Grid-connected EV charger installations should be reviewed with APUA for available service capacity, metering, load management, earthing, protective devices, installation approval, commissioning, and any site-specific distribution constraints. The country is an OECS/CARICOM island economy with a renewable-energy push, so chargers connected to solar, storage, hotel, marina, airport, or tourism sites should also account for local distribution capacity and power-quality review.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达公共电力由安提瓜公共事业管理局（APUA）供应。该市场沿用英制/IEC传统电网环境，标称为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。并网电动汽车充电桩安装应与APUA核查可用供电容量、计量、负载管理、接地、保护器件、安装审批、调试及站点特定配电限制。该国属于OECS/CARICOM岛国旅游经济体，并推动可再生能源，因此接入太阳能、储能、酒店、码头、机场或旅游场所的充电桩还应考虑本地配电容量和电能质量审查。
summary.zht: 安地卡及巴布達公共電力由安地卡公共事業管理局（APUA）供應。該市場沿用英制/IEC傳統電網環境，標稱為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。併網電動汽車充電樁安裝應與APUA核查可用供電容量、計量、負載管理、接地、保護器件、安裝審批、調試及站點特定配電限制。該國屬於OECS/CARICOM島國旅遊經濟體，並推動可再生能源，因此接入太陽能、儲能、酒店、碼頭、機場或旅遊場所的充電樁還應考慮本地配電容量和電能質量審查。

standards_or_laws: Antigua Public Utilities Authority (APUA) electricity service and connection requirements
Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS) national standards and adopted IEC / regional standards
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Local licensed electrical installation and utility acceptance requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply, GB/T 18487.1-2023 conductive charging requirements, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication, and local grid-operator project acceptance. Antigua and Barbuda is also 50 Hz, but its nominal 230/400 V supply differs from the China domestic 220/380 V baseline and requires confirmation of input-voltage range, protection ratings, and thermal performance.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常围绕220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电、GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电要求、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930-2023直流通信及当地电网运营商项目验收进行设计。安提瓜和巴布达同为50 Hz，但其标称230/400 V供电不同于中国220/380 V国内基线，须确认输入电压范围、保护器件额定值和热性能。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常圍繞220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電、GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電要求、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊及當地電網運營商項目驗收進行設計。安地卡及巴布達同為50 Hz，但其標稱230/400 V供電不同於中國220/380 V國內基線，須確認輸入電壓範圍、保護器件額定值和熱性能。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must not treat the market as voltage-identical to China. Confirm that AC and DC charger input stages, transformers, rectifiers, protective devices, meters, surge protection, and thermal design cover 230/400 V 50 Hz service and local voltage variation. Prepare single-line diagrams, load calculations, harmonic and EMC data, earthing details, commissioning records, and APUA-facing installation documentation before shipment or site activation.
gap.zh: 出口商不得将该市场视为与中国电压完全相同。须确认交流和直流充电桩输入级、变压器、整流器、保护器件、计量装置、浪涌保护及热设计覆盖230/400 V 50 Hz供电及当地电压波动。出货或站点启用前，应准备单线图、负荷计算、谐波和EMC数据、接地详情、调试记录及面向APUA的安装文件。
gap.zht: 出口商不得將該市場視為與中國電壓完全相同。須確認交流和直流充電樁輸入級、變壓器、整流器、保護器件、計量裝置、浪湧保護及熱設計覆蓋230/400 V 50 Hz供電及當地電壓波動。出貨或站點啟用前，應準備單線圖、負荷計算、諧波和EMC數據、接地詳情、調試記錄及面向APUA的安裝文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations as utility and electrical-installation acceptance; exact APUA process and site requirements must be confirmed for the project
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an APUA approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence is not enough without 230/400 V confirmation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] APUA-ready documentation should prove 230/400 V 50 Hz suitability, site load capacity, power quality, protection coordination, and commissioning readiness. China 220/380 V domestic design evidence alone is not enough for Antigua and Barbuda.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向APUA的文件应证明230/400 V 50 Hz适用性、站点负荷容量、电能质量、保护配合和调试就绪状态。仅有中国220/380 V国内设计证据不足以用于安提瓜和巴布达。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向APUA的文件應證明230/400 V 50 Hz適用性、站點負荷容量、電能質量、保護配合和調試就緒狀態。僅有中國220/380 V國內設計證據不足以用於安地卡及巴布達。
